title: Auto Totem Swaper
description: Auto swaps totem to offhand, when opening inventory.
body:
# ✨ Totem Swapper ✨

💀 Never lose a totem again. Stay protected at all times!

# 🛡️ What is Totem Swapper?

Totem Swapper is a lightweight and reliable Fabric mod that automatically moves a Totem of Undying into your offhand when you open your inventory.

No more dragging items manually. No more panic moments. Just smooth, instant protection ⚡

# 🚀 Features

🔁 Automatic Totem Swap
→ Instantly moves a totem to your offhand when needed

🎮 Toggle Anytime
→ Press R to turn the mod ON/OFF

📦 Works Everywhere
→ Detects totems in:

Inventory

Hotbar

⚡ Fast & Reliable
→ Smart swapping system (no glitches or missed swaps)

💬 Status Feedback
→ Shows ON/OFF status directly in-game

# 🧠 How It Works

Open your inventory

If no totem is in your offhand…

The mod finds one in your inventory or hotbar

Instantly swaps it into your offhand 🛡️

# 🎯 Why Use This Mod?

🧟 Survive dangerous situations

⚔️ Perfect for PvP & Hardcore

🧠 No need to think — it just works

⏱️ Saves time and reaction speed

# ⌨️ Controls

Key	Action
R	Toggle Totem Swapper ON/OFF

⚙️ Requirements

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

# 💡 Future Plans

❤️ Auto swap on low health

🔄 Advanced refill system

👑 Credits

💻 Developed by Omgreal

💡 Idea inspired by a friend Arnav

❤️ Final Note

If you like the mod, consider supporting it and sharing it with others!
More updates coming soon 🚀
